title: morenia ruitzii
intro: Morenia ruitzii, also known as the "Mexican wild yam", is a perennial plant native to Mexico and Central America. It is a species of vine that belongs to the Dioscoreaceae family, and its root has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The root of the Morenia ruitzii plant is rich in diosgenin, a steroidal saponin with anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which makes it useful for treating menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and other health conditions. Morenia ruitzii can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and its herbal preparations have been used to promote relaxation, reduce pain and inflammation, and support reproductive health.
